title: Update preact to version 6.0.1 🚀
body:
Hello lovely humans, [preact](https://www.npmjs.com/package/preact) just published its new version 6.0.1.
State Update :rocket:
Dependency preact
New version 6.0.1
Type devDependency
This version is **not covered** by your **current version range**. Without accepting this pull request your project will work just like it did before. There might be a bunch of new features, fixes and perf improvements that the maintainers worked on for you though. I recommend you look into these changes and try to get onto the latest version of preact. Given that you have a decent test suite, a passing build is a strong indicator that you can take advantage of these changes by merging the proposed change into your project. Otherwise this branch is a great starting point for you to work on the update. Do you have any ideas how I could improve these pull requests? Did I report anything you think isn’t right? Are you unsure about how things are supposed to work? There is a collection of [frequently asked questions](https://greenkeeper.io/faq.html) and while I’m just a bot, there is a group of people who are happy to teach me new things. [Let them know](https://github.com/greenkeeperio/greenkeeper/issues/new). Good luck with your project :sparkles: You rock! :palm_tree: --- The new version differs by 27 commits . - [`d26ab44`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/d26ab44ac21a85650e22cf0dc3d8efc28997a569) 6.0.1 - [`d3c7a46`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/d3c7a46d0702b00d9fbb2171ae86fcb6ae60d606) Install missing dependency for npm t (#291) - [`81c5808`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/81c5808dc1be53c60a0a02ff1022060cedae0d60) chore(package): update pretty-bytes-cli to version 2.0.0 (#285) - [`23f6c44`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/23f6c4428e0b2d9f19888e6a1a0c0a214ad7562b) 6.0.0 - [`6be3ff5`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/6be3ff501982017b173b43dba9be6d60451c0b17) Follow-up to #260: When picking up from SSR, no elements are marked with `_component`/`_componentConstructor` and thus none match via `isSameNodeType()`. When this happens, fall back to attempting to re-use elements in-order. - [`5c22af6`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/5c22af6ea467d89fd0f95efaf944a4c4c1e7b5fa) Amendment to solution for #260: when in `mountAll` mode (initial render of a component), attempt to re-use parent's `base` for high-order children that do not initialize with a recycled `base`. - [`ceb6167`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/ceb6167568286aba1188f2e933ff1c403a0c630a) Breaking: Discard keyed nodes when they don't match the updated DOM description instead of allowing them to be re-used unkeyed. This should fix #254 /cc @gnaeus - [`cfe02d4`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/cfe02d48830fd665aa1db5037183b4223409559c) ✄ (Small) Breaking Change: `linkState()` no longer falls back to component paths and no longer auto-invokes the target path if it is a function. These features were unused and poor documented, and added extra weight. - [`ba48cd3`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/ba48cd3741bb1266dab6418db19783aa151c182b) Fix flakey test relying on attribute ordering in `innerHTML` serialization (Firefox 45 I'm looking at you) - [`4da16e2`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/4da16e209dca0f3b75bd94db9ad321a4698b274e) Bugfix: when swapping between Text, Comment and Element nodes, reclaim whole orphaned trees rather than just their roots. - [`7049c08`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/7049c0851d8737069ea632298a8ac9ed89aea05f) Bugfix: prevent the recycler from collecting non-Element nodes 🐛 - [`68dce67`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/68dce67f2c17a419320e2dfa59673dce3dffcbfc) Remove default empty `vnode` hook (note: this is technically a breaking change, but very few people use this API and documentation has mentioned performing an existence check on the previous hook prior to calling it for a long time) - [`513ba51`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/513ba510fc72245f2e5df1e51f5ab66618108d58) Remove commented out code. - [`1ba8ef7`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/1ba8ef7a767e34db3a0aa949d4053a3a2f8e015d) Add inline doc/note about VNode Hooks as suggested by @Robert-Wett 👍 - [`4fc4a85`](https://github.com/developit/preact/commit/4fc4a851aeb853c4fa2050e956a61453864bd069) Merge branch 'master' of github.com:developit/preact There are 27 commits in total. See the [full diff](https://github.com/developit/preact/compare/a495b9d283c48abae911c175beaf07c62f8e8401...d26ab44ac21a85650e22cf0dc3d8efc28997a569). --- This pull request was created by [greenkeeper.io](https://greenkeeper.io/). Tired of seeing this sponsor message? :zap: `greenkeeper upgrade`
